Home.name: Cuong (Henry) Nguyen
Home.tagline: AI Engineer · Vibration-Based Fault Diagnosis & Edge AI
Home.bio: Mechatronics graduate from Hanoi University of Science and Technology, focused on building AI systems that diagnose mechanical faults from vibration signals — from signal preprocessing and transformer models all the way to deploying them on edge devices for real-time inference. Outside of research, I build small AI-powered indie projects in my spare time.

About.title: Contact
About.intro: The fastest way to reach me is by email. I'm also active on the platforms below.

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.researchList: Signal Processing for Fault Detection, Vibration Analysis, PHM, RUL Prediction, Explainable AI, Transfer Learning
